title: agropyron cristatum subsp. pectinatum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. pectinatum, also known as spike wheat grass or wheat grass, is a type of plant belonging to the grass family, Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. pectinatum include reducing blood sugar levels, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, juice, or capsule, and is also used in herbal remedies for its potential benefits in wound healing and as an antiseptic.
